metadata.overview: Provides orchestration capabilities to control and read data from MicroBT Whatsminer Bitcoin miners. Operations here affect physical hardware. Always prioritize thermal safety and verify telemetry changes after issuing commands.

telemetry.name: hashrate_rt
telemetry.description: Real-time hashrate. A value of 0 implies the miner is offline, booting, or experiencing a catastrophic failure.

telemetry.name: power_draw
telemetry.description: Current power draw. If dramatically lower than limit_watts, a hashboard might be dead.

telemetry.name: temperature_in
telemetry.description: Ambient air temperature entering the miner.

telemetry.name: temperature_out
telemetry.description: Outlet temperature. Critical metric. If this exceeds 85C, intervention is required.

telemetry.name: fan_speed_in
telemetry.description: Inlet fan speed. Below 2000 RPM usually indicates a broken fan.

telemetry.name: fan_speed_out
telemetry.description: Outlet fan speed. Below 2000 RPM usually indicates a broken fan.

telemetry.name: status
telemetry.description: Device status: online, offline, rebooting, degraded.

commands.name: reboot
commands.description: Safely restarts the miner controller. Takes 2-3 minutes for telemetry to resume.
commands.constraints: Do not call more than once in a 5-minute window per device.

commands.name: setPowerLimit
commands.constraints: Never set below 2000W or hashboards may fail to initialize. Max is model-dependent (3500W-4000W).

commands.name: setLED
commands.description: Toggle the physical LED indicator on the device.

commands.name: setPowerMode
commands.description: Set the device power mode: normal, low, high.

commands.name: registerThing
commands.description: Register a new device in this worker's rack.

commands.name: updateThing
commands.description: Update an existing device's info or options.

commands.name: saveComment
commands.description: Add a comment to a device.

commands.name: editComment
commands.description: Edit an existing comment on a device.

commands.name: deleteComment
commands.description: Delete a comment from a device.

troubleshooting: If alert.overheat, verify fan_speed_in and fan_speed_out. A fan speed of 0 is a mechanical failure.
If alert.hashrate_low, the miner might be tuning boards (expected after power change, wait ~15 minutes).
If status is OFFLINE, do not attempt reboot — telemetry layer cannot reach device. Escalate to human.

errors.E_PSU_ERR: Power supply unit reporting error or unstable output
